title: Goertek Scholarships Awarded
content: Senkang was selected as a recipient of the Goertek Scholarships for the 2025/26 academic year, sponsored by Goertek Inc.

title: Research Featured by CCTV, China News, and China Daily
content: Major media outlets reported CityUHK's multi-agent intelligence research. The coverage highlighted Senkang's work on multi-agent collaborative perception and edge video analytics, spanning robust cross-domain perception for connected autonomous driving and efficient distributed video analytics.

title: Paper Accepted by ICML'26
content: One first-author paper, Optimizing Agentic Reasoning with Retrieval via Synthetic Semantic Information Gain Reward, was accepted by The 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026), see you in Seoul, South Korea. 🇰🇷🇰🇷🇰🇷

title: Start a New Journey in Oxford
content: Senkang started a new journey as a Visiting PhD at the Department of Computer Science, University of Oxford, working on LLM agentic RL, self-evolution, and game theory.

title: Three Papers Accepted by CVPR'26
content: Three papers were accepted by CVPR 2026, including 2 main conference papers and 1 Findings paper. See you in Denver, USA. 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸

title: Invited Talk at SLAI
content: Senkang gave an invited presentation at the Agentic Intelligence for Human-AI Society Symposium at Shenzhen Loop Area Institute (SLAI), featuring his recent work on Agentic RL, Optimizing Agentic Reasoning with Retrieval via Synthetic Semantic Information Gain Reward.

title: Invited Talk at PolyU
content: Senkang gave an invited talk at The Hong Kong Polytechnic University (PolyU), titled Toward Efficient Agentic Reasoning and Task Adaptation.

title: Paper Accepted by TMC
content: One first-author paper, CP-uniGuard: A Unified, Probability-Agnostic, and Adaptive Framework for Malicious Agent Detection and Defense in Multi-Agent Embodied Perception Systems, was accepted by IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing (TMC).

title: Invited Talk at NJU
content: Senkang gave an invited talk at the School of Intelligence Science and Technology, Nanjing University (NJU).

title: Best Paper Award
content: Our paper UAV-enabled Computing Power Networks: Task Completion Probability Analysis received the Best Paper Award at IEEE GLOBECOM 2025.

title: IEEE ComSoc Student Grant Award
content: Senkang was awarded the IEEE ComSoc Student Grant to support his conference travel.

title: Paper Accepted by NeurIPS'25
content: One first-author paper, Distribution-Aligned Decoding for Efficient LLM Task Adaptation, was accepted by NeurIPS 2025. See you in San Diego, USA. 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸

title: Two Scholarships Awarded
content: Senkang was awarded Chow Yei Ching School of Graduate Studies (CYCSGS) Scholarship (10 awardees university-wide and the sole awardee in the Department of Computer Science) and Research Tuition Scholarship (RTS)! Congratulations! 🎉

title: Three Papers Accepted by GLOBECOM'25
content: Three papers were accepted by IEEE GLOBECOM 2025, including one first-author paper, Task-Aware Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Large Pre-Trained Models at the Edge. See you in Taipei.

title: Paper Accepted by TMC
content: One first-author paper, AgentsCoMerge: Large Language Model Empowered Collaborative Decision Making for Ramp Merging, was accepted by IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing (TMC).

title: Paper Accepted by WCM
content: One first-author paper, Collaborative Perception for Connected and Autonomous Driving: Challenges, Possible Solutions and Opportunities, was accepted by IEEE Wireless Communications Magazine (WCM).

title: New Project Launched: Multi-Agent Embodied Autonomous Driving
content: We launched a new project on Multi-Agent Embodied Autonomous Driving. The repository continuously collects recent papers in this area and serves as a curated resource for the community.

title: PhD Qualification Success
content: Senkang passed the PhD Qualifying Examination (QE)! He is now a PhD candidate! 🎉🎉🎉

title: Paper Accepted by ICRA'25
content: One co-authored paper, Directed-CP: Directed Collaborative Perception for Connected and Autonomous Vehicles via Proactive Attention, was accepted by ICRA 2025.

title: AAAI'25 Oral Presentation
content: Our paper accepted by AAAI'25 was selected for Oral Presentation! Congratulations again! 🎉

title: Paper Accepted by ToN
content: One co-authored paper was accepted by IEEE/ACM Transactions on Networking (ToN).

title: Paper Accepted by AAAI'25
content: Congratulations! 🎉 One first-author paper entitled CP-Guard: Malicious Agent Detection and Defense in Collaborative Bird's Eye View Perception was accepted by The 39th Annual AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI'25), see you in Philadelphia, USA 🇺🇸!

title: Paper Accepted by IEEE TITS
content: One paper was accepted by IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (TITS).

title: IEEE ComSoc Student Grant Award
content: Senkang was awarded the IEEE ComSoc Student Grant to support his conference travel.

title: Paper Accepted by IEEE TMC
content: One paper was accepted by IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing (TMC).

title: Two Papers Accepted by GLOBECOM'24
content: Two papers were accepted by GLOBECOM'24, see you in Cape Town, South Africa 🇿🇦!

title: Institutional Research Tuition Grant
content: Senkang was awarded the Institutional Research Tuition Grant, nearly HK$170,000.

title: Relocation to Hong Kong
content: Congratulations to Senkang! 🎉 Finally moved to Hong Kong 🇭🇰🇭🇰🇭🇰 to start his new career!

title: InnoHK Award Funding
content: Thanks to Prof. Fang's strong support, Senkang received the InnoHK Award Funding, around HK$900,000 from the Government of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region to support his research and PhD career.

title: Graduation from BIT
content: Senkang graduated from Beijing Institute of Technology. Thanks to all the professors, senior students and friends who helped him in the past four years.

title: National Scholarship Award
content: Senkang was awarded the National Scholarship for ranking in the top 1% of his department, one of the highest honors for undergraduate students in China.
